Operation 'searchResults' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_context. Original summary 'Search web results' is too generic and doesn't convey the operation's unique capabilities or scope. Description lacks details about: (1) required input parameters (search query), (2) the variety of result types available (health topics, jobs, federal register), (3) special features like keyword highlighting, (4) the structure of the response object. Enhanced version clarifies what the operation does, what inputs are needed, what outputs to expect, and highlights the advanced features that differentiate this API from generic search, improving AI agent interpretability for determining when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve search results from indexed federal government web content. Returns web results, best bets, spelling corrections, and related search suggestions.
data.summary_suggestion: Search federal government web content with advanced features
data.description_suggestion: Searches indexed federal government web content and returns comprehensive results including web pages, best bets (curated recommendations), spelling corrections, and related search suggestions. Supports keyword highlighting and multiple result types (web results, health topics, job openings, federal register documents). Requires a search query parameter. Returns a SearchResultsResponse object containing matched results, metadata, and optional enhancements like spelling suggestions and related searches.
data.reasoning: Original summary 'Search web results' is too generic and doesn't convey the operation's unique capabilities or scope.
